text.title: Accessibility Evaluation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: do not claim compliance; advance to stage 3
verify against the 6 keyboard criteria; record per-criterion pass/fail
reject finding; re-run with human + recording
rerun audit post-transition; verify focus restored

example.trace: agent reports VoiceOver pronounced 'button' without audio → fabricated-transcripts rule → finding rejected

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
